scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run dev -w @telegram-bot-template/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/core && npm run dev -w @telegram-bot-template/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/core && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/api && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run typecheck -w @telegram-bot-template/core && npm run typecheck -w @telegram-bot-template/api && npm run typecheck -w @telegram-bot-template/web
scripts.smoke:api: npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/core && npm run smoke -w @telegram-bot-template/api
scripts.test:api: npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/shared && npm run build -w @telegram-bot-template/core && npm run test -w @telegram-bot-template/api
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:api && npm run smoke:api
